task.title: Fix player jump buffering
task.description: The player only jumps if input is held for multiple frames. Adjust jump buffering so a quick tap still triggers jump.

trajectory.action: Inspect how jump input is sampled and consumed in player and movement scripts.
trajectory.observation: Input buffer is decremented before jump check, causing missed tap events.
trajectory.next_decision: Move jump consumption before buffer decrement in _physics_process.

trajectory.action: Reorder jump buffer logic to consume buffered input first.
trajectory.observation: Quick taps now trigger jump during next physics frame.

task.title: Fix inventory button signal
task.description: Inventory button does not open the panel in UI scene. Connect the correct signal target and method.

trajectory.action: Check button node path and connected signal callback in ui_controller.gd.
trajectory.observation: Signal points to old node path after scene refactor.
trajectory.next_decision: Reconnect pressed signal to current controller callback.

trajectory.action: Update signal connection to call _on_inventory_pressed on UIController.
trajectory.observation: Panel toggles correctly when pressing button.

outcome.notes: Initial reconnect used stale method name; second attempt fixed callback.

task.title: Resolve enemy hit flash timing
task.description: Enemy sprite flash effect persists too long after damage. Fix timer reset behavior.

trajectory.action: Trace damage event and flash timer lifecycle.
trajectory.observation: Timer restarts but material override is never cleared on timeout edge case.
trajectory.next_decision: Ensure timeout handler always restores default material.

trajectory.action: Patch timeout callback to clear override and guard duplicate timer starts.
trajectory.observation: Flash now lasts expected duration and resets cleanly.
